title: helenium elegans var. amphibolum
intro: Helenium elegans var. amphibolum, also known as Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, Sneezeweed has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as colds, fever, and respiratory infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and support the immune system. Sneezeweed can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to make topical applications and ingestible preparations for its medicinal properties.
